# cat /etc/src.conf 
WITHOUT_ATM=ok
WITH_BSD_GREP=ok
WITHOUT_CROSS_COMPILER=ok
WITH_CTF=ok
WITHOUT_DMAGENT=ok
WITH_EXTRA_TCP_STACKS=ok
WITHOUT_FLOPPY=ok
WITHOUT_GNU_DIFF=ok
WITHOUT_GNU_GREP=ok
WITHOUT_LIB32=ok
WITHOUT_LLVM_TARGET_ALL=ok
WITH_LOADER_LUA=ok
WITHOUT_MAIL=ok
WITHOUT_REPRODUCIBLE_BUILD=ok

# cat /etc/make.conf 
MALLOC_PRODUCTION=true
